headline: Passionate pDOOH Enthusiast: Bridging the Gap Between Real World and Digital Conversions > Keen on an adventure ? Lets chat!
summary:
Welcome to a world of possibilities in pDOOH (Programmatic Digital Out-of-Home) marketing!

With a passion for innovation and a keen eye on industry trends, I specialize in empowering brands and clients to harness the true potential of this dynamic medium.

My mission is to curate unforgettable brand experiences that resonate with audiences in the real world and seamlessly connect with them in the digital realm driving lead generation.

Through strategic thinking, cutting-edge technologies, and data-driven insights, I offer brands the tools they need to leave a lasting impact on their audience.

From facilitating, eye-catching content to optimizing programmatic strategies, I am committed to driving tangible results and elevating brand visibility.

My approach is centered on collaboration, understanding each client's unique identity, objectives, and challenges. Together, we can create campaigns that spark curiosity, foster engagement, and inspire action.

I firmly believe in the power of pDOOH to redefine the way brands communicate with the world.

By leveraging this transformative medium, brands can transcend through the line and craft authentic massive impacted connections that resonate with their audiences.

Let's embark on this journey of innovation and discovery together.

I'm dedicated to helping you unlock the full potential of pDOOH, guiding your brand towards new horizons and ensuring every campaign is a resounding success.

Reach out to explore how we can revolutionize your brand's presence in the world of pDOOH.

Together, let's make an indelible mark on the landscape of marketing, captivating hearts, and inspiring minds along the way.

Look forward to making magic with you!

Email : kyle@pdooh.co.za
location_str: City of Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Digital Marketing Sales Exec
experiences.description: Mark 1 is a cutting edge Digital Media Sales house that specializes in, Standard Display, Rich Media, Online Video, In-Gaming, and Mobile Media Marketing. We give brands the opportunity to place themselves directly in front of their target audience. Clients can also track how well their campaign is doing and where there money is being spent. I made the decision to leave the print advertising industry because I personally feel DIGITAL is the way forward.

experiences.title: Business Development Executive
experiences.description: Rolling Stone as you all know has shaped the worlds pop culture. Rolling Stone South Africa is the face of South Africa. We not only highlight the music industry across all genres / demographics but we also house Politics / Entertainment and anything else that matters in South Africa. What i do is offer brands the platform to advertise themselves to South Africa over various mediums be it Print Media, Online , Pod Casts and even huge events. If you are interested in aligning your brand with South Africa please feel free to contact me directly.

experiences.title: Business Development Manager
experiences.description: Profile existing companies in corporate South Africa and Government that are Gender Empowered through online media, events and the publication. Part of the job is also to form synergy's between prospective clients in there various sectors and create investment opportunities across the board of South Africa.

experiences.title: Sales Manager
experiences.description: Trained and managed sales for the college. Worked with people that wanted to expand their connection with themselves. Metavarsity offers the Introduction to Metaphysics course , Applied Metaphysics course and a Diploma in Metaphysics

experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Exec
experiences.description: Sold team building opportunities to Corporate South Africa. Started Xtreme Varsity and ran the sales side of the project

education.school: Red & Yellow Creative School of Business
education.activities_and_societies: Activities and Societies: Covered everything within the digital marketing sphere.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: The Most Award for Best Digital Sales Team 2016
# 1 in the Google Ready to Rock Comp
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: Ready to Rock was a competition that Google SA put together. The competition was based on who can bring in the most new business for 2015 Q4. We came first.

accomplishment_projects.title: XTREME VARSITY
accomplishment_projects.description: I noticed that varsity students were paying the same amount as an adult to go down the Orange River. So we put together Xtreme Varsity Special a student packaged river trip. This project is very successful to this day. If you need more information visit the Felix Unite website for more information.

recommendations:
Renier Lombard

I have had the pleasure of working Kyle, collaborating on several projects. Kyle's ability to handle multiple projects was unlike any Ive seen before and his industry knowledge is extensive. He leads people with style and grace to ensure his clients get world-class service. No matter how unique and complex the brief was, Kyle made sure the end product was beyond our expectations. As a leader, Kyle earns my highest recommendation.

Joe Steyn-Begley

Kyle is a very rare breed.Even though we affectionately referred to him as "The Wolf" (after Jordan Belfort) for his exceptional sales skills, he is much more than that. His passion for human connection, building and maintaining relationships and entrenching himself in his clients' world are some of the outstanding qualities that he possesses.I have not met a single person that has met Kyle and not immediately taken a liking to him. So many of the clients he worked with saw him more as an ally, a partner and friend more than just a supplier.He is multifaceted in that he brings not only superb client service skills to the table but also strategic and out-of-the box thinking.His dedication to his craft and gaining a deep and thorough understanding of his industry is what gives him the edge. It was proven time and time again when he overdelivered on targets and deadlines under extreme pressure.Furthermore, he is a vibrant and extremely positive being that always brings joy to the workplace and company culture. There is always a great vibe when Kyle is in the room and it is another outstanding quality that makes him a phenomenal asset to any business.It was an absolute pleasure to work with him over many years and, like with so many of his clients, he has become more than just a colleague and coworker but a lifelong friend.

Renier Lombard

I have had the pleasure of working Kyle, collaborating on several projects. Kyle's ability to handle multiple projects was unlike any I’ve seen before and his industry knowledge is extensive. He leads people with style and grace to ensure his clients get world-class service. No matter how unique and complex the brief was, Kyle made sure the end product was beyond our expectations. As a leader, Kyle earns my highest recommendation.
